name: implementation-slice
description: Stage-first implementation-slice recipe: read-only planning, bounded foreach implementation in managed worktrees, and read-only review reduce for the runtime task.

stages.prompt: Use the runtime task to produce JSON with a bounded workItems array of independently reviewable implementation slices. Each item must include id, goal, filesLikelyAffected, constraints, validation, risk, and sensitiveWorkPolicy. Flag any slice that may need sensitive work such as dependency install, broad edits, long or expensive validation, package/audit commands, deployment, publishing, pushes, uploads, or external mutation.

each.prompt: Implement this scoped work item in the managed worktree only: ${item}. Follow the sensitiveWorkPolicy captured in the item; if sensitive work is needed but not explicitly allowed, stop and report the blocker instead of assuming permission. Keep changes minimal and report validation commands.

stages.prompt: Using Source Stage Context and the runtime task, review implementation outputs and artifact paths. Summarize completed slices, blockers, risks, validation evidence, and recommended human next action. Do not auto-merge.

useWhen: plan then implement in managed worktrees
avoidWhen: deploy publish push upload external mutation
